disposition_rationale: Repair per the operator's direction: the snapshot helper switches from export_meta_snapshot (which materializes every build_file_meta row, O(indexed files), and whose own docstring says to prefer read_build_summary) to the bounded read_build_summary path (build_layer_meta scalars plus one COUNT). Readiness derives from no per-file metadata: chunker_versions comes from the layer scalars and code_sources_in_scope comes from configured include-prefixes alone, which is exactly the 1p7is missing-code-layer intent (prefixes configured, layer absent). The source pin extends over the snapshot helper region to forbid export_meta_snapshot and file_meta references so the O(files) read cannot silently return.
